Our pieces are crafted using 18K gold plating over durable bases, ensuring they withstand the test of time while maintaining their golden glow. We believe luxury should be accessible without compromising on the weight, feel, or soul of the design. portrait of elegant woman wearing gold jewelry editorial artistic
